opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lip started burning yesterday, and today it's erupted into this cluster of agonising, weeping blisters on my lower lip. It looks awful and it's really upsetting me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came up so fast and it's so painful and visible that I panicked — I want to know what it is and whether I can do something to stop it getting worse.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago it started as a tingling, burning feeling on my lower lip
symptom_narrative.duration: 1 day — the tingling was yesterday and the blisters came up over the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: a tight cluster of small tense blisters on a red base right on the edge of my lower lip; a few have burst and now sting like raw little sores
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning is really intense and it's very painful, and I'm distressed by how fast it appeared and how it looks
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right on the border of my lower lip, on the outside
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started and it got worse over the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: talking and anything touching the lip; the burst ones sting the most
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no ulcers inside my mouth, no fever, no rash or spots anywhere else on my body, and I haven't started any new medicines
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had cold sores like this before, but never this bad — they usually come when I'm run down or stressed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: it's sore to talk and eat, and I feel self-conscious and stressed about how it looks

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurring cold sores on the lip that come back when I'm stressed or short on sleep, though milder than this

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medicines; I've only put some lip balm on it from a tube I share

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has been under intense work-related stress with poor sleep in the lead-up to this; normally independent

objective_data_offered.value: on video, a small tight cluster of little fluid-filled blisters on a red base sitting right on the edge of the lower lip; a few have broken and are weeping clear fluid; the skin around it does not look widely red, hot or swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-directed phone camera; close-up lip detail is hard to judge on video and lighting is variable

objective_data_offered.value: 37.1 C measured with a home thermometer, no fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: a mildly tender, tender-to-press small lump felt under the right side of the jaw
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-palpation, not a clinician examination
